Averaged 3.087 million viewers on CBS. Peaked at 3.93M during PKs.

items.title: Mitchell Robinson was on the floor during the open portion of Knicks practice at Finals Media Day, wearing a black wrap on his right hand after undergoing surgery to repair a pinky fracture. He ran through some drills, dribbling, shooting and catching passes with his right hand.
